creator: moonshade@pnhz.kz
text:
"make FORMATS=txt install" on docs collection with www/links install instead
of www/links1 worked without error. Maybe textproc/docproj should depend on
www/links, more recent version of links?

ested only on en_US.ISO8859-1 and ru_RU.KOI8-R docs.

btw, doesn't www/links1 and www/links conflicts?

How-To-Repeat: 

1. install www/links insted of www/links1
2. build docs in text format
